hero.title: TOMOCLOUD
hero.leadJa: 新しい自分が視える世界へ

vision.heading: Our Vision
vision.subtitleJa: 視える化技術により全ての人が自分らしく生きることのできる社会を創造する
vision.subtitleEn: Enabling authentic lives through the power of visualization.
vision.p1: For most of us, tracking our health day-to-day isn't easy. Simple, continuous ways to monitor the body remain limited.
vision.p2: There have also been limited means to easily monitor the body and tissues.
vision.p3Strong: At TOMOCLOUD, we visualize the invisible
vision.p4: With visualization technology, we turn complex biosignals into clear, intuitive insights so everyone can live more authentically.

questionnaire.p2: Please help us improve our product by sharing your daily challenges and desired features in our survey.

values.title: Act like an owner
values.text: Own the problem alongside the user; take responsibility and see it through.

values.title: Act from zero

ogawa.bio: Studied at the University of Edinburgh as a representative of Tobitate! Study Abroad JAPAN. Driving social implementation at the intersection of medicine and engineering, developing EIT-based devices to address lymphedema after gynecologic cancer treatment. Selected for JST START (2022) with Prof. Takei and team.

takei.bio: Formerly at Nihon University (Assistant–Professor). Led research on electrical measurement and mechanics of multiphase flow, and advanced EIT fundamentals and applications (industrial/biomedical). At Chiba Univ., expanding to plant and biomedical measurement, visualizing thrombi in blood flow (KAKENHI A). Also selected for NEDO advanced IoT project (EIT & AI for lymphedema).

Multiple awards incl. NEDO special jury prize; NEDO TCP finalist

message.heading: Message
message.title: Visualize the New Self
message.p1: Even while working in an engineering lab, I spent my student years on hospital wards, listening directly to patients and clinicians. One patient said, "What frightens me most is that I can't visualize what's happening inside my body." That stayed with me—and made me determined to build technology that eases that invisible anxiety. The more I listened, the more I felt these were not someone else's problems, but challenges I should help solve.
message.p2: I also learned a simple, profound truth: patients are people leading full lives. Each person is at once a patient, a family member, a friend, a professional—many versions of "self" that existed before illness and will continue after. I want to support all of those selves. That's why we shape technology not as a mere tool, but as a companion woven into everyday life.
message.p3: What we've established is the power of visualization through Electrical Impedance Tomography (EIT). Human tissues have distinct electrical properties, and those properties shift with fluid composition. EIT makes it possible to visualize the invisible—to render these properties clearly and non-invasively, with practical precision.
message.p4: With this, we can replace some costly, burdensome tools and enable at-home monitoring that used to be impossible to visualize—opening new possibilities for early detection and ongoing monitoring of conditions like lymphedema and other chronic diseases.
message.p5: But our aim isn't visualization for its own sake. It's to provide a compass: to visualize the invisible, make sense of it, and help you take the next step. When the invisible is visualized, people can move forward. We want to support that moment—using visualization as a shared language that gently connects medicine, caregiving, and everyday health—so everyone can live more authentically. And we will expand this model, born in Japan, to the world.

eit.heading: Core Technology: EIT
eit.p1: Electrical Impedance Tomography (EIT) reconstructs images of impedance distribution using multiple electrodes.
eit.p2: It literally turns the \"unseen\" into something visible.
eit.p3: By applying small currents via surface electrodes and measuring potentials, EIT visualizes internal states non-invasively and in real time.
eit.p4_prefix: TOMOCLOUD Inc. was founded based on research conducted at

lymphedema.heading: What is Lymphedema?
lymphedema.p1: Lymphedema is a condition in which swelling occurs in the limbs due to impaired lymphatic flow.
lymphedema.p2: Beyond appearance changes, it can cause pain and heaviness, affecting quality of life and work.
lymphedema.p3: Early detection and continuous observation are important, yet truly simple and non-invasive methods have been limited.
lymphedema.p4: We aim to realize an EIT-based monitoring method that can be performed routinely with minimal burden.

product.title: LT monitor
product.lead2: It aims to visualize internal states in real time and enable daily, continuous assessment.
product.b2: Simple, intuitive UI to reduce user burden

questionnaire.heading: Survey Request
questionnaire.p1: Thank you for your continued support.
questionnaire.p2: TOMOCLOUD Inc. is developing \"LT monitor Lite,\" a device that allows you to monitor edema (swelling) at home.
questionnaire.p3: This survey aims to gather feedback on your daily challenges, desired features, and any concerns about purchasing the product to help us improve our development.
questionnaire.p4: Your responses will be collected anonymously and used solely for product improvement and quality enhancement. By submitting your response, you agree to these terms.
questionnaire.p5: We appreciate your valuable time and cooperation.

recruit.title: Careers
paragraphs: TOMOCLOUD is a startup spun out of a diverse, interdisciplinary research lab.
We value each other's cultures and expertise, and challenge one another to grow.
Breakthroughs are created by professionals with diverse backgrounds.
By fusing foundational and new technologies around noninvasive \"visualization,\" we deliver value to medical, nursing, and healthcare settings.
If you see the potential and are eager to turn it into reality, we'd love to work with you.
